The '''''Reprisal''''' was a [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

The ''Reprisal'' had a long service life typical of the class, and had visited [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] at some point prior to the [[Runaway Droid Ride]].

By [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], the ''Reprisal'' was part of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s fleet and was deployed at [[Comkin V]] in the failed attempt to capture the ''[[Millennium Falsehood]]''. Her bow [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] were softened by an explosive package disguised as debris launched by the ''Millennium Falsehood''. The ship was then finished by a salvo of 14 [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] launched by the seven [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] of [[Wraith Squadron]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
